PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-15-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ashwin Ladva for Monetta Bujdoso.

The Court stated that there had been 3 continuances to take care of the dificiencies and that it was inclined to take the matter off calendar until an amended petition is filed. The matter was taken off calendar.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR#7489. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F.Smith.
